pi_items.source: Task description (task.json line 3-5) explicitly states 'configure an Omelet Fillings modifier group'. Verified against task.json description and verifier.py line 35 which uses this exact name.

Task description explicitly states 'Set Minimum Quantity to 2' (task.json line 4). Verified against verifier.py line 33 which expects expected_min=2. Floreant POS documentation confirms min/max quantity fields exist on modifier groups (floreant.org menu programming documentation).

Task description explicitly states 'Set Maximum Quantity to 4' (task.json line 4). Verified against verifier.py line 34 which expects expected_max=4. Floreant POS documentation confirms these fields support max quantity constraints.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a modifier group named 'Omelet Fillings' in Floreant POS 1.4-build1707b (a real open-source restaurant POS system). The configuration requires setting MIN_QUANTITY to 2 and MAX_QUANTITY to 4 on the MODIFIER_GROUP database table. Floreant POS stores these constraints in an Apache Derby database and supports enforcement of min/max modifier selections. The 'Omelet Fillings' group is task-synthetic (not a default Floreant POS preset), but the database schema and field names are real and documented in Floreant POS.
